title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to join our core engineering team and help build cutting-edge digital products for global clients.
responsibilities: Design and develop scalable web applications
Collaborate with product managers and designers
Mentor junior developers
Lead technical architecture decisions
Participate in code reviews
requirements: 3+ years of React and Node.js experience

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Join our design team to craft beautiful, intuitive user experiences for complex web and mobile applications.
responsibilities: Create wireframes, prototypes and high-fidelity designs
Conduct user research and usability testing
Define design systems and component libraries
Collaborate closely with developers
Present design concepts to stakeholders
requirements: Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite

title: Mobile App Developer (React Native)
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications that delight users across iOS and Android platforms.
responsibilities: Develop high-quality mobile applications using React Native
Optimize app performance and user experience
Integrate with backend APIs
Work with QA team for thorough testing
Publish and maintain apps on App Store and Play Store
requirements: Experience with native iOS and Android development
Knowledge of mobile UI/UX best practices

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Help us build and maintain robust, scalable infrastructure that powers our products and client applications.
responsibilities: Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines
Manage cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)
Implement security best practices
Monitor system performance and availability
Automate operational tasks
requirements: Strong knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes

title: Business Development Manager
description: Drive business growth by identifying new opportunities, building relationships with potential clients, and closing deals.
responsibilities: Identify and pursue new business opportunities
Manage the entire sales cycle from prospecting to closing
Build and maintain strong client relationships
Collaborate with technical team on proposals
Meet and exceed quarterly sales targets
requirements: Strong network in the tech industry

title: Content Writer & Marketing Specialist
description: Create compelling content that tells our brand story and helps our audience understand the value we provide.
responsibilities: Write blog posts and technical articles
Manage social media presence
Create marketing collateral
Develop email marketing campaigns
Track and analyze content performance
